Description: frontend-canary deployed with broken PRODUCT_CATALOG_SERVICE_ADDR (productcatalogservices:3550 instead of productcatalogservice:3550)
Customers randomly begin receiving 500 errors when accessing product pages due to load balancer sending traffic to misconfigured canary pods
Error Budget burn alert triggers due to sustained 500 errors in frontend
madhavikarra@ identify specific product endpoint (LS4PSXUNUM) throwing 500 errors and wall of STDOUT errors: 'name resolver error: produced zero addresses'
ricc@ analyzes frontend-canary environment variables and discovers the 'services' typo
Canary pods successfully resolve product catalog; 500 errors cease; error rate returns to baseline 0%
